top_signals.title: Vitol Overtakes Shell in Ranking of US Physical Gas Traders
top_signals.summary: Vitol Group, the world’s largest commodity trading house, boosted trading in the US physical natural gas last year by more than all but one of its top rivals amid booming demand for the fuel.
